# Best AI Image Upscalers for Print Quality in 2026

Low-resolution images can't be printed — until now. AI image upscalers can enhance images to print quality!

Check out our [[link:/category/Image|Image category]] for more tools.

---

## [[link:/tools/3|Stable Diffusion]]: Open-Source Upscaling

[[link:/tools/3|Stable Diffusion]] offers powerful upscaling capabilities through its various models and tools.

### Stable Diffusion for Upscaling
- **Multiple models**: Choose the best for your needs
- **Customizable**: Fine-tune results to your liking
- **Free**: Open-source with no cost

---

## [[link:/tools/4|Canva Magic Design]]: Quick Upscaling

[[link:/tools/4|Canva Magic Design]] includes basic upscaling features for quick improvements.

### Canva for Upscaling
- **Quick fixes**: Fast image enhancement
- **Integrated**: Works with your design workflow
- **Easy to use**: No learning curve
